text:
The Fort Briggs doctor is a doctor and automail engineer at Fort Briggs.

An expert in the cold's effect on the human body as well as in cold climate automail, she is vital to the continued health and well-being of the soldiers of Briggs, and by extension the fort itself. It is likely that she worked on the development of Buccaneer's Modified M1910 and Heavy Combat M1913-A limbs alongside Neil.

Trivia

In the anime adaptation, at the Briggs Doctor's desk, there is a picture frame of a family photo where it's possible to view her four siblings and parents. Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood, Episode 34: Ice Queen (2009 series); Family photo 
It is possible that the men of the fort don't consider her to be womanly, similar to the way they feel about Major General Armstrong. This is made apparent in Chapter 71 when they miss Winry, calling her their "precious female resource" Fullmetal Alchemist Volume 18, Page 79; First Printing May 2009; VIZ Media; San Francisco USA and the "flower of [their] fort" Fullmetal Alchemist Volume 18, Page 79; First Printing May 2009; VIZ Media; San Francisco USA with the doctor in the room.
She is supposedly named Patricia. A big portion of the fandom refers to her by this name.
